title: Minty Shaggy Greek Salmon Soup
description: A citrusy, creamy avgolemono salmon soup with tahini, fresh mint, and a salt-block finish. Perfect for a post-workout, keto-friendly dinner.
instructions: Heat the fish stock in a pot over medium until it reaches a gentle simmer.
Add the cured salmon, capers, and dill to the stock and simmer for 5 minutes.
Whisk together the egg yolks, tahini, yogurt, lemon juice, orange juice, and olive oil until smooth.
Reduce the heat to low and slowly pour the egg-tahini mixture into the pot while stirring constantly to create an avgolemono sauce.
Cook gently for 3-4 minutes, letting the soup thicken slightly without boiling.
Season the soup with salt and pepper, then stir in the fresh mint.
Transfer the hot soup to a preheated salt block, allowing the block to infuse subtle mineral flavors.
Serve immediately, garnishing with extra dill and a drizzle of olive oil.
